src/main/java/org/example/GreetingConfig.general_idea: Simplify the configuration mapping prefix to 'app' and adjust property names to maintain the same effective configuration keys.
Introduce a new configuration property for default delay with a default value of 200.

src/main/java/org/example/GreetingResour.general_idea: Move the resource base path from root to /api/ to align with API versioning standards.
Remove the synchronous subprocess execution from the hello endpoint to improve performance and stability.
Remove manual OpenTelemetry span annotation in favor of automatic instrumentation or Quarkus-specific tracing.
Add a new endpoint that simulates latency using a utility class for testing purposes.
Add a new endpoint allowing clients to specify the delay duration via path parameter.
Add a dedicated endpoint that throws a BadRequestException to test error handling flows.
Add a new endpoint that simulates latency before throwing an error for testing delayed failure scenarios.
Implement a custom exception mapper to convert BadRequestException into a specific 500 Internal Server Error response.
Inject a new utility class to handle waiting and evaluation logic, decoupling these concerns from the resource.

src/test/java/org/example/GreetingResour.general_idea: Update the test to hit the new API path that was introduced during the migration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler plugin to version 3.13.0 for better compatibility with Java 21.
Update the Maven Surefire plugin to version 3.5.0 for improved test execution support.
Increment the project artifact version from 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT to 1.4.0-SNAPSHOT.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add environment variable files to gitignore to prevent committing sensitive configuration data.

README.adoc.general_idea: Refactor the README structure to include new sections for Quarkus application details, OpenShift components, and community components.
README.adoc.human_impl: Added '=== Quarkus application', '=== Openshift Components', and '=== Community components' headers and reorganized content.

README.adoc.general_idea: Update documentation links to point to OpenShift 4.16 documentation instead of 4.12.
Update the description of OpenShift Distributed Tracing to reflect the migration from Jaeger to Grafana Tempo.
README.adoc.human_impl: Changed description to mention 'Grafana Tempo project' instead of 'Jaeger'.

README.adoc.general_idea: Update the description of Cluster Logging to reflect the migration from EFK to Vector+Loki.
README.adoc.human_impl: Changed description to mention 'Vector+Loki' and removed references to ElasticSearch/Fluentd/Kibana.

README.adoc.general_idea: Add a new section detailing the Quarkus application setup, including how to start, how it works, and how to run it locally or in containers.
README.adoc.human_impl: Added '== The Quarkus Application' section with subsections for starting, working, and running the app.

README.adoc.general_idea: Add a new section describing the full GitOps installation process on OpenShift using ArgoCD.
README.adoc.human_impl: Added '== Full install on OpenShift' section with prerequisites and ArgoCD app deployment instructions.

README.adoc.general_idea: Add a new section detailing individual component deployments, including Quarkus App, OpenTelemetry, Distributed Tracing, Monitoring, Alerting, Logging, and Grafana.
README.adoc.human_impl: Added '== Deploy components individually' section with subsections for each component.

README.adoc.general_idea: Add a new annex section explaining Network Policies with Observability.
README.adoc.human_impl: Added '== Annex A: Network Policies with Observability' section.

README.adoc.general_idea: Add a new annex section explaining Tekton Pipelines as Code.
README.adoc.human_impl: Added '== Annex B: Tekton Pipelines as Code' section.

README.adoc.general_idea: Add a new annex section explaining how to create images with expiration labels in Quay.
README.adoc.human_impl: Added '== Annex C: New image with expiration in Quay' section.

README.adoc.general_idea: Update the AsciiDoc configuration to change the image directory path.
Update the AsciiDoc configuration to increase the section numbering levels.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.native.general_idea: Update the base image tag from a specific version to latest to ensure compatibility with the new Java 21 runtime environment.
Add explicit chmod flag to the COPY instruction to set file permissions directly during the build, replacing the previous RUN chmod approach.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.native-micro.general_idea: Add explicit chmod flag to COPY instruction to set executable permissions on the native runner binary.

src/main/resources/META-INF/resources/in.general_idea: Update the application version and Quarkus version displayed in the HTML title and metadata section to reflect the new release.
Add CSS styles for new API endpoint buttons, including specific styling for error-inducing endpoints.
Replace the generic Quarkus starter page content with specific links to the application's API endpoints and Swagger UI.
src/main/resources/META-INF/resources/in.human_impl: Visit the SWAGGER UI ... Hello

src/main/resources/META-INF/resources/in.general_idea: Update the extension name in the documentation list from 'RESTEasy Reactive' to 'Quarkus REST' to match current Quarkus naming conventions.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Add a new application configuration property for default delay.
Enable OpenAPI inclusion for health endpoints.
Update the OpenAPI info version to 1.0.2.
